headline: Broadcom, Qualcomm, or TSMC: Why One AI Chip Stock Won Decisively in April
summary: The April 2026 scoreboard for the artificial intelligence (AI) chip trade is in, and the winner is not the most-watched name on Wall Street. Qualcomm (NASDAQ:QCOM) stock surged 39.45% in April, decisively beating Broadcom (NASDAQ:AVGO) stock at 34.87% and leaving Taiwan Semiconductor (NYSE:TSM) stock far behind at a 17.19% gain. headline: Cantor Fitzgerald Raises PT on QUALCOMM (QCOM) Stock
summary: QUALCOMM Incorporated (NASDAQ:QCOM) is one of the Most Promising AI Stocks to Invest In. headline: Want $2,200 in Passive Income? Invest $50,000 Into These 3 Dividend Stocks
summary: Earned income demands your time. Dividend income does not. The appeal of a check that arrives every 90 days, regardless of market conditions, is the foundation of every serious passive-income strategy. Real estate offers similar cash flow but locks up capital, charges friction on every transaction, and cannot be liquidated in an afternoon. Dividend stocks ... Want $2,200 in Passive Income? Invest $50,000 Into These 3 Dividend Stocks
